creator: kristinacors
caption: If you don’t want to miss out on other NYC gems like these check out my 7 day NYC itinerary linked in my bio! #travelbucketlist #travelseries #nycitinerary #nychiddengems #travelcontentcreator

transcription.text: Don't go to New York City without visiting these three outdoor hidden gems. First up we have Elizabeth Street Garden, a hidden gem located in Nolita. You won't believe it but this is my first time going to this park and I'm a New Yorker. It's so picturesque. I love the ivy covered walls and they have a bunch of statues and columns that make this place feel like a garden in Europe. Second we have a secret botanical garden. This is one of my favorite gems because they have an actual treehouse you can visit and who's inner child doesn't love treehouses. It's open April through October so you'll be able to visit soon. It's called Botanical Garden 6BC. By the way if you like these spots and you're into my aesthetic, I created a seven-day New York City itinerary you'll love. It's filled with beautiful gems I've found as a local over the years and it's organized by themes like partying for your birthday or speakeasies. It's completely different from my New York City holiday itinerary and you can check it out at the link in my bio. Third is Riverside Park. I feel like sometimes this park gets overlooked for Central Park but it's gorgeous especially during cherry blossom season and less crowded. Follow for more hidden gems in New York City and around the world.
